title: Trouble for Two
writer: Robert Louis Stevenson, Manuel Seff, Edward E. Paramore Jr.
actors: Robert Montgomery, Rosalind Russell, Frank Morgan
plot: The Crown Prince (Robert Montgomery) is to marry the Princess Brenda of Irania, but the Princess declines the arranged marriage. Relieved, Florizel heads for London, with the Colonel (Frank Morgan), where he seeks adventure and a ...
